info.description:
Public REST API for agentserver. Generated from
Go handler annotations via swaggo/swag; see
docs/api/README.md for regeneration instructions.
info.title: agentserver API

Register an agent (obtain sandbox credentials)

Get a single agent card by sandbox ID
Check session validity

post.description: Validates credentials; on success sets the session cookie and returns {"status":"ok"}.

post.description: On success returns the new user id. The first registered user becomes admin.

post.description: Initiates pause transition; returns {"status":"pausing"}. Final state lands asynchronously.

post.description: Creator is auto-added as owner. May fail with 403 if the per-user workspace quota is exceeded.

Get a workspace by id

delete.summary: Delete a workspace (owner only; cascades to sandboxes + namespace)

get.description:
Returns the audit trail for a workspace. Owner/maintainer only —
developers do not have access. Filtering: event_type, from, to.
Pagination: limit (default 100, max 500), offset.
get.summary: List workspace audit events
List credential bindings for a workspace

post.description: On success returns 201 with the new binding. When the provider requires OIDC device code authentication returns 202 with verification_uri and user_code; poll device-complete to finalize.
post.summary: Create a credential binding for a workspace

409.description: cannot delete default binding while others exist

post.description: Long-polls until the user authorizes the device code. Returns 201 with the created binding on success.
post.summary: Complete an OIDC device code flow for a pending credential binding

404.description: no pending device code flow found

409.description: duplicate display_name or flow already being completed

post.summary: Set a credential binding as the default

get.summary: List IM channels in a workspace

post.description: Resolves the workspace channel_routing_strategy and binds accordingly. Returns 409 in hybrid mode.
post.summary: Auto-provision and bind a sandbox to an IM channel
Bind a Matrix account to a workspace
Bind a Telegram bot to a workspace

post.description: Returns a QR code URL the user scans in WeChat. Client should then long-poll qr-wait until the channel is bound.
post.summary: Start WeChat QR-code bind for a workspace

post.description: Polls for QR scan progress. Returns status "wait", "scaned", "confirmed", "expired", or other terminal states. On "confirmed", bot_id is set. On "expired", qrcode_url contains a refreshed code.
post.summary: Long-poll WeChat QR-code scan for a workspace

post.description: Stores the Meta access token and phone_number_id. Inbound messages reach the agent via the public /webhook/whatsapp endpoint (configured in the Meta App dashboard).
post.summary: Bind a WhatsApp Cloud number to a workspace

get.summary: List workspace invites

post.description:
Issues a single-use invite. The invite_url is returned ONCE here
(also sent by email if a real mailer is configured); the
plaintext token is never persisted nor re-readable.
post.summary: Create a workspace invite

409.description: invite already pending for this email

get.description: The returned api_key is masked (first 3 + "..." + last 4). updated_at is null when no config is set.
get.summary: Get workspace LLM config (owner/maintainer)

put.description: On update, omitting api_key retains the existing key.

400.description: validation error (invalid URL / missing field / too many models)

get.summary: Get the workspace's daily LLM request quota usage
List members of a workspace

post.description: Looks up the user by email. Default role is "developer" if omitted.
post.summary: Add a member to a workspace

get.description: Redirects the browser to the ModelServer OAuth authorization URL. Returns 302.
get.summary: Initiate ModelServer OAuth connection for a workspace
Get ModelServer connection status for a workspace
List operations log entries for a workspace

parameters.description: Return entries after this RFC3339 timestamp
parameters.name: since

get.summary: List agent interaction audit trail for a workspace
List agent cards in a workspace

get.description: Returns prefix-only metadata. Secrets are never included.
get.summary: List workspace API keys

post.description: Returns the secret ONCE in the response body. At least one Available scope must be provided.
post.summary: Mint a workspace API key

400.description: name required / scope not available / at least one scope required

422.description: expires_at invalid (bad RFC3339 / in past / >365d in future)

get.description: Returns the catalog of scope names + descriptions. Available=false entries are placeholders shown greyed-out in the UI.
get.summary: List available API key scopes
List Codex browser sessions for a workspace
Get workspace quota defaults and current sandbox count

get.summary: List sandboxes in a workspace

post.description: Validates type / CPU / memory / idle_timeout / quota / budget. Returns 201 immediately with status="provisioning"; container starts asynchronously.
post.summary: Create a sandbox in a workspace

CookieAuth.description: Session cookie set by POST /api/auth/login. All non-auth endpoints assume this cookie.
CookieAuth.name: agentserver-token

name.description:
Name is the display name applied to a newly provisioned sandbox.
Optional; defaults to "Channel agent — {provider} {bot_id}".

sandbox_type.description:
SandboxType picks the agent runtime when a new sandbox needs to be
provisioned. Optional; defaults to "openclaw" which has IM-channel
integrations baked in. Ignored when an existing shared sandbox is
reused.

composition.description:
Composition layers a soul (identity) + N skills (capabilities) on
top of the sandbox at boot. Refs follow the grammar in
docs/playground-design.md §4.3 ("git:<name>@<sha>" or "draft:<uuid>").
When omitted, the sandbox boots without composition (legacy behavior).
